content: 2026-04-03 Session Summary: Completed ALL 9 security audit subtasks and marked task done. New items fixed: REGISTRATION_DISABLED enforced at API level (was UI-only), Socket.io CORS restricted from origin:* to NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL. Built Calendar + Gantt chart views for project tasks (ProjectCalendar.tsx, 640 lines, pure React/Tailwind). Calendar has month grid with task pills on due dates, Gantt has horizontal timeline bars grouped by column. Added task click support - clicking tasks in Calendar/Gantt opens TaskPanel sidebar. Fixed prop drilling bug where CalendarView, GanttView, and GanttRow sub-components needed onTaskClick passed explicitly. Key commits: 7d90d56 (file access scoping), f57a232 (registration+CORS), 414aca5 (calendar+gantt), 45b773b (task click), b090d2e+1297509 (prop fixes). Also fixed mc-send.js to use 127.0.0.1 after port lockdown.
